title: Bootstrap the TypeScript monorepo and quality gates
summary: Initialize the pnpm workspace, exact tool versions, strict TypeScript configs, formatting/linting, package boundaries, test commands and CI skeleton described by M0.
acceptance: Workspace contains agreed apps/packages with enforceable dependency direction
Typecheck, lint, unit-test and content-validation commands run from root
Tool versions are pinned and documented in an ADR
No product runtime behavior is implemented beyond a minimal smoke test
